pages.title: Dimensional Runes
pages.text: The trader currency. Five flavors, all dropped from Mine Cells dungeons. Every trade is priced in Prison runes (the baseline) plus an optional thematic secondary.

pages.title: Prison Rune
pages.text: Baseline. Every trader takes it. Cheap trades are Prison-only.

pages.title: Promenade Rune
pages.text: Nature theme. Used by Archer, Musician, Fisherman, Flag Maker.

pages.title: Insufferable Crypt Rune
pages.text: Tech and industry theme. Used by Banker, Engineer, Mechanist, Tinkerer.

pages.title: Ramparts Rune
pages.text: Military and magic theme. Used by Priest, Wizard, Rogue.

pages.title: Black Bridge Rune
pages.text: Cursed and dark theme. Used by Cultist, Scientist, Blight. The most expensive single trade in the pack — the Mechanical Drill at the Mechanist — costs 60 Prison plus 10 Black Bridge.

pages.title: Price tiers
pages.text: Indicative Prison amounts per tier:$(br)$(li)Trivial 1, Cheap 2, Entry 5, Low-Mid 10.$(li)Mid 18, Shop 20, High 28.$(li)Engine Basic 30, Top 40, Pinnacle 50.$(li)Engine Advanced 60, Elite 64.$(br)Secondary runes scale at roughly Prison divided by five. Trades inside a trader sort by total weighted cost.
